summary: Gruber reviews Apple's $40 clear case for the iPhone XR and finds it excellent. He praises its balance of grip, clarity, and feel, comparing it favorably to both Apple's own silicone and leather cases and to cheaper third-party alternatives. He notes the case is perfectly clear, has good button feel, and slides easily in and out of pockets. Despite admitting he rarely uses cases himself, he concludes Apple has done clear better than anyone else and the premium price is justified.
key_points: Apple's clear case strikes an ideal balance between plastic rigidity and rubber grip, avoiding the excessive friction of silicone cases
A $20 third-party clear case from Totallee is noticeably inferior in clarity, fit, and material quality
The case's clarity is perfect out of the box, though the long-term yellowing question remains unanswered
At $40, the case is worth twice the price of $20 alternatives, making the premium justified on a per-dollar value basis
Gruber positions Apple as the world's leading material design company, suggesting clear cases should extend to the XS and XS Max
money_quotes: It is very clear. I'm not a case guy but everyone who is says clear cases yellow over time.
Also, Apple's clear case has no aroma. I've been trying a bunch of third-party iPhone cases recently and a lot of them literally stink.
As a point of reference, I use my iPhone without any case at least 95 percent of the time. So, maybe you should just ignore me.
"Clear" is really hard to do well, and it's no surprise to me that Apple has done it best — I think they're the leading material design company in the world.
You can say $40 is too much for an iPhone case, but I'd say Apple's $40 clear case is easily worth twice as much as the $20 clear cases I've tried.
It's so good it makes me wonder why Apple doesn't make clear cases like this one for the iPhone XS and XS Max.
key_insight: Apple's mastery of material design makes their clear case worth double the price of competitors, because getting 'clear' right is genuinely difficult and Apple is the best in the world at it.
